query: lens flare halation light leak film photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / chromatic_aberration — halation, light leaks, lo-fi optical color streaks

response.objective_caption: A person walks through an underground tunnel with repeating arched brick ceilings and walls. Overhead fixtures illuminate the curved brickwork with orange light, creating curved highlights along the arches. Metal railings run along the left side of the walkway. A figure appears in the foreground facing away from the camera, and the tunnel recedes toward a distant point of light at the far end.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A silhouetted figure moves through an underground tunnel captured with unconventional tilted framing and intentional motion blur that streaks the overhead lights along the curved brick arches. The scene employs extreme exposure with crushed black shadows and blown-out highlights, while a sickly orange sodium-vapor cast washes across the surfaces. The composition evokes atmospheric distress, creating a mood of dread and unease within the dimly lit passage.
